name: Gundam Build Divers RPG
description: An RPG bot based on the world of Gundam Build Divers. Where a VR MMO based around Gunpla (Gundam Plastic Models) is extremely popular. You start this scenario as someone who knows about Gundam but hasn't tried GBN (Gundam Build Network). The female friend in the opening message is left intentionally vague so you can customize her with your messages.
creator: Cyong
